contract.name: v2/agency/toptier_code/federal_account/count.md
contract.description: Counts the unique federal and treasury accounts for a given agency and fiscal year.

toptier_code.description: Numeric CGAC or FREC identifier for the agency; observed values are 3 or 4 digits.
toptier_code.constraints: Required. Route only matches numeric segments of length 3-4. Extra digits are trimmed to the last four before validation. Non-numeric segments return an HTML 404. Requests without the trailing slash receive a 301 redirect to the canonical path.

fiscal_year.description: Optional appropriations fiscal year; defaults to the current fiscal year (2026 observed) when omitted or sent as an empty value.
fiscal_year.constraints: Must parse to an integer between 2008 and 2026 inclusive. Leading zeros are accepted. Empty query values default to the current year, while whitespace or other non-digit characters trigger a 400 type error. Values outside the range return 422 with explicit bounds messaging.

toptier_code.description: Echoes the requested agency code as a zero-padded string.

fiscal_year.description: Fiscal year actually used to compute the counts.

federal_account_count.description: Distinct federal accounts linked to the agency in the fiscal year.

treasury_account_count.description: Distinct treasury account symbols (TAS) for the agency in the fiscal year.

messages.description: Always present array of warning or info strings; FY 2008-2016 return a DATA Act notice while FY 2017+ are typically empty.

messages: Account data powering this endpoint were first collected in FY2017 Q2 under the DATA Act; as such, there are no data available for prior fiscal years.

quirks: Omitting fiscal_year or sending it empty defaults to the current fiscal year (2026 observed); whitespace characters fail validation with a 400 type error.
Fiscal years 2008-2016 return zero counts accompanied by a DATA Act warning message, while 2017 and later generally provide populated data with an empty messages array.
Leading zeros in the fiscal_year query parameter are accepted and normalized before processing.
Unknown query parameters are ignored rather than rejected.
Non-numeric path segments for toptier_code return an HTML 404 page, but numeric values that fail validation return JSON error payloads.
Supplying more than four digits in toptier_code results in the last four digits being validated (e.g., '12345' is treated as '2345').
Requests without the trailing slash receive a 301 redirect to the canonical slash-terminated URL.
risks: Endpoint has exhibited empty responses over IPv6, necessitating IPv4 fallback during testing.
Error payload formats vary between HTML and JSON depending on how the route fails to match.
gaps: Maximum accepted fiscal_year is 2026 as of 2026-02-13; behavior once newer fiscal years become available remains unverified.

probes.notes: Default fiscal year applies when the query parameter is omitted.
Valid historical fiscal year returns populated counts.

response.bodyExcerpt: {"toptier_code":"012","fiscal_year":2010,"federal_account_count":0,"treasury_account_count":0,"messages":["Account data powering this endpoint were first collected in FY2017 Q2 under the DATA Act; as such, there are no data available for prior fiscal years."]}

probes.notes: Pre-2017 fiscal years return zero counts with a DATA Act warning.
Leading zeros in fiscal_year are accepted and normalized.
Empty fiscal_year query value defaults to the current fiscal year.

response.bodyExcerpt: {"detail":"Invalid value in 'fiscal_year'. ' ' is not a valid type (integer)"}

probes.notes: Whitespace fails type validation for fiscal_year.
Values below the minimum fiscal year return 422 with bounds messaging.
Values above the maximum fiscal year return 422 with bounds messaging.

response.bodyExcerpt: {"detail":"Agency with a toptier code of '999' does not exist"}

probes.notes: Unknown numeric toptier_code returns JSON 404 detail.

response.bodyExcerpt:
Not Found

The requested resource was not found on this server.

probes.notes: Non-numeric toptier_code path segments return HTML 404 responses.

response.bodyExcerpt: {"detail":"Agency with a toptier code of '2345' does not exist"}

probes.notes: Five-digit toptier_code values are truncated to the last four digits before validation.
Requests without the trailing slash receive a 301 redirect to the canonical path.

mismatches: Documentation advertises a numeric request body schema, but the live endpoint relies solely on the path parameter and ignores request bodies.
gaps: Maximum accepted fiscal_year is 2026 as of 2026-02-13; behavior once newer fiscal years become available remains unverified.
risks: Endpoint has exhibited empty responses over IPv6, necessitating IPv4 fallback during testing.
Error payload formats vary between HTML and JSON depending on how the route fails to match.
